frame_eqs_str: a['wave_r']=(Math.max(0, Math.min(0.5, (div(a['bass_att'],2)-0.3)))+div((Math.sin((a['time']*2.4))+1),4)); a['wave_g']=(Math.max(0, Math.min(0.5, (div(a['treb_att'],2)-0.3)))+div((Math.sin((a['time']*1.9))+1),4)); a['wave_b']=(Math.max(0, Math.min(0.5, (div(a['mid_att'],2)-0.3)))+div((Math.sin((a['time']*2.2))+1),4)); a['wave_x']=div(Math.floor(randint(11)),10); a['vol']=div(((a['bass_att']+a['mid_att'])+a['treb_att']),5); a['mv_x']=64; a['mv_y']=(a['vol']*3); a['vcheck']=((Math.abs(above(a['vol'], 0.5))>0.00001)?(1):(0)); a['mv_r']=((Math.abs(above(a['bass'], Math.max(a['mid'], a['treb'])))>0.00001)?(a['vcheck']):(0)); a['mv_g']=((Math.abs(above(a['treb'], Math.max(a['mid'], a['bass'])))>0.00001)?(a['vcheck']):(0)); a['mv_b']=((Math.abs(above(a['mid'], Math.max(a['bass'], a['treb'])))>0.00001)?(a['vcheck']):(0));
